name: pii-json-checker
description: Detects potential PII fields (first name, last name) in JSON and .NET files and shows inline warnings like SonarQube

piiJsonChecker.severity.description: Severity level for sensitive field diagnostics

piiJsonChecker.enableLoggingDetection.description: Enable/disable sensitive field detection in logging statements

piiJsonChecker.categories.pii.description: Enable detection of Personal Identifiable Information (PII) fields such as names, emails, addresses, SSN, etc. (GDPR, CCPA compliance)

piiJsonChecker.categories.financial.description: Enable detection of financial data fields such as credit card numbers, bank accounts, CVV, etc. (PCI-DSS compliance)

piiJsonChecker.categories.health.description: Enable detection of health information fields such as patient IDs, diagnoses, prescriptions, etc. (HIPAA compliance)

piiJsonChecker.categories.credentials.description: Enable detection of authentication credential fields such as passwords, API keys, tokens, connection strings, etc. (SOC2, ISO27001 compliance)

piiJsonChecker.customPatterns.health.description: Additional health information patterns to detect (e.g., ['allergyInfo', 'bloodType'])

piiJsonChecker.excludedPatterns.description: Patterns to exclude from detection (e.g., ['displayName'] to allow display names without warnings)

piiJsonChecker.loggingFunctions.description: Additional logging function names to detect (e.g., ['myLogger.log', 'customLog'])

piiJsonChecker.maskingPatterns.description: Additional masking method patterns to recognize as safe (e.g., ['.sanitize(', '.encrypt('])
